TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tjuruguai, title = Tjuruguai, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjuruguai} }

S.FORM: alang Tjuruguai ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 104 buwan, 319 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 297 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjuruguai hya' ga Kaidi. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tjuruguai ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 104 buwan, 319 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 297 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjuruguai hya' ga Kaidi. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjuruɣuai ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu rajijoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na tjuruɣuai ħjaʔ ɣa kai*i. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
